channel.title: GitLab Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by GitLab Inc. (gitlab).

item.title: CVE-2026-15168 · 2.5 LOW — Use of Uninitialized Variable in Wireshark
item.description: BLF file parser in Wireshark 4.6.0 to 4.6.6 and 4.4.0 to 4.4.16 allows possible information disclosure

item.title: CVE-2026-15166 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in Wireshark
item.description: IEEE 802.11 protocol dissector crash in Wireshark 4.6.0 to 4.6.6 and 4.4.0 to 4.4.16 allows denial of service

item.title: CVE-2026-15174 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Heap-based Buffer Overflow in Wireshark
item.description: Catapult DCT2000 protocol dissector crash in Wireshark 4.6.0 to 4.6.6 and 4.4.0 to 4.4.16 allows denial of service

item.title: CVE-2026-15172 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Unchecked Input for Loop Condition in Wireshark
item.description: FMP/NOTIFY protocol dissector crash in Wireshark 4.6.0 to 4.6.6 and 4.4.0 to 4.4.16 allows denial of service

item.title: CVE-2026-15173 · 4.7 MEDIUM — Heap-based Buffer Overflow in Wireshark
item.description: pcapng file parser crash in Wireshark 4.6.0 to 4.6.6 allows denial of service

item.title: CVE-2026-15171 · 5.5 MEDIUM — NULL Pointer Dereference in Wireshark
item.description: SSH protocol dissector crash in Wireshark 4.6.0 to 4.6.6 and 4.4.0 to 4.4.16 allows denial of service

item.title: CVE-2026-15167 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Stack-based Buffer Overflow in Wireshark
item.description: DBS Etherwatch file parser crash in Wireshark 4.6.0 to 4.6.6 and 4.4.0 to 4.4.16 allows denial of service

item.title: CVE-2026-15170 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Heap-based Buffer Overflow in Wireshark
item.description: Z39.50 protocol dissector crash in Wireshark 4.6.0 to 4.6.6 and 4.4.0 to 4.4.16 allows denial of service

item.title: CVE-2026-15163 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop') in Wireshark
item.description: Multiple protocol dissector infinite loops in Wireshark 4.6.0 to 4.6.6 and 4.4.0 to 4.4.16 allow denial of service

item.title: CVE-2026-15164 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Heap-based Buffer Overflow in ciscodump
item.description: Crash in ciscodump 4.6.0 to 4.6.6 and 4.4.0 to 4.4.16 allows denial of service

item.title: CVE-2025-12506 · 3.5 LOW — Use of Incorrectly-Resolved Name or Reference in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 16.5 before 18.11.7, 19.0 before 19.0.4, and 19.1 before 19.1.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user to create a repository where the content…

item.title: CVE-2026-6896 · 8.7 HIGH — Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 13.11 before 18.11.7, 19.0 before 19.0.4, and 19.1 before 19.1.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with developer-role permissions to execute…

item.title: CVE-2026-7492 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Missing Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 9.1 before 18.11.7, 19.0 before 19.0.4, and 19.1 before 19.1.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an unauthenticated user to determine the existence of a private…

item.title: CVE-2026-11827 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Insufficiently Protected Credentials in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 9.5 before 18.11.7, 19.0 before 19.0.4, and 19.1 before 19.1.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with maintainer-role permissions to obtain a…

item.title: CVE-2026-13151 · 2.7 LOW — Incorrect Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 16.10 before 18.11.7, 19.0 before 19.0.4, and 19.1 before 19.1.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user to modify group-level settings beyond thei…

item.title: CVE-2026-13320 · 7.3 HIGH — Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 15.7 before 18.11.7, 19.0 before 19.0.4, and 19.1 before 19.1.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user to execute arbitrary scripts in another…

item.title: CVE-2026-10086 · 8.7 HIGH — Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 16.4 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with developer-role permissions to execute…

item.title: CVE-2026-0934 · 3.8 LOW — Incorrect Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 17.9 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with custom role permissions to view, creat…

item.title: CVE-2026-1606 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 14.8 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user to conceal content within a Snippet due…

item.title: CVE-2026-2238 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 17.5 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an unauthenticated user to view confidential issue references…

item.title: CVE-2026-3176 · 3.1 LOW — Missing Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 18.6 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with limited permissions to access project…

item.title: CVE-2026-5309 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 18.6 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user to read or modify another group's virtual r…

item.title: CVE-2026-5796 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Incorrect Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 13.6 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with Reporter-level group permissions to…

item.title: CVE-2026-5952 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Incorrect Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 17.11 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with developer-role permissions to bypa…

item.title: CVE-2026-8330 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 9.3 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed sensitive information to be written to application logs due to…

item.title: CVE-2026-10712 · 8 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 18.10 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an unauthenticated user to execute arbitrary JavaScript in a…

item.title: CVE-2026-11379 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Incorrect Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 13.11 prior to 18.11.6, 19.0 prior to 19.0.3, and 19.1 prior to 19.1.1 in which incorrect authorization in DAST site profile management could allow a user with Developer role to…

item.title: CVE-2026-12053 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed a user to access sensitive information that had already been committed to a project, due to insufficient outpu…

item.title: CVE-2026-12635 — Reliance on Reverse DNS Resolution for a Security-Critical Action in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 8.3 before 18.11.6, 19.0 before 19.0.3, and 19.1 before 19.1.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with maintainer-role permissions to make…

item.title: CVE-2026-11968 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argument Injection') in TortoiseGit
item.description: Argument Injection in TortoiseGitBlame via Malicious Git History Filenames Leads to Arbitrary File Write in TortoiseGit

item.title: CVE-2026-1500 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 17.10 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user to cause denial of service due to unc…

item.title: CVE-2026-3553 · 3.1 LOW — Incorrect Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 12.0 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user to access confidential issue details d…

item.title: CVE-2026-6269 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Incorrect Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 15.10 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with developer-role permissions to mo…

item.title: CVE-2026-6277 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Incorrect Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 13.9 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with Security Manager-role permissions to…

item.title: CVE-2026-6552 · 8.7 HIGH — Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 15.5 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with group Owner role to take over anothe…

item.title: CVE-2026-6976 · 3.7 LOW — Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 15.9 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with developer-role permissions to hid…

item.title: CVE-2026-7250 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 12.10 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an unauthenticated user to cause denial of service due to i…

item.title: CVE-2026-8589 · 7.3 HIGH — Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 13.1.4 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user to add unauthorized email addresses to…

item.title: CVE-2026-9204 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 18.10 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user to read arbitrary files from the Gita…

item.title: CVE-2026-9694 · 2.6 LOW — Improper Neutralization of Substitution Characters in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 15.9 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions, could have allowed an unauthenticated user to impersonate the GitLab Support B…

item.title: CVE-2026-10087 · 8.7 HIGH — Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 17.1 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with developer-role permissions to execut…

item.title: CVE-2026-10733 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Improper Restriction of Rendered UI Layers or Frames in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 17.0 before 18.10.8, 18.11 before 18.11.5, and 19.0 before 19.0.2 that could have allowed an authenticated user to cause denial of service on the CI/CD Catalog page due to imp…

item.title: CVE-2026-9758 · 7.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper Certificate Validation in S2OPC
item.description: Improper comparison with the certificates trusted list in S2OPC allows an attacker well-formed untrusted certificate to be considered trusted

item.title: CVE-2026-6899 · 5.6 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Improper Check for Certificate Revocation in S2OPC
item.description: Check for certificate revocation only considers the first matching CRL and ignores other valid CRLs of the same CA in the CycloneCrypto cryptographic wrapper of S2OPC library. It might allow connection between an OPC UA client and server using a revo…

item.title: CVE-2026-9807 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Incorrect Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 18.9 before 18.10.7, 18.11 before 18.11.4, and 19.0 before 19.0.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed a blocked Project Access Token to continue accessing private…

item.title: CVE-2026-9759 · 5.5 MEDIUM — NULL Pointer Dereference in Wireshark
item.description: ROHC protocol dissector crash in Wireshark 4.6.0 to 4.6.5 and 4.4.0 to 4.4.15 allows denial of service

item.title: CVE-2026-1402 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 17.1 before 18.10.7, 18.11 before 18.11.4, and 19.0 before 19.0.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user to cause denial of service due to insu…

item.title: CVE-2026-2601 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Missing Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 11.5 before 18.10.7, 18.11 before 18.11.4, and 19.0 before 19.0.1 that under certain conditions could have allowed an authenticated user with developer-role permissions to access…

item.title: CVE-2026-4868 · 8.2 HIGH — Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 18.8 before 18.10.7, 18.11 before 18.11.4, and 19.0 before 19.0.1 that, under certain conditions, could have allowed an authenticated user to cause specific Duo AI workflows to r…

item.title: CVE-2026-5296 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Missing Authorization in GitLab
item.description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 18.7 before 18.10.7, 18.11 before 18.11.4, and 19.0 before 19.0.1 that when foundational flows were enabled at the group level, could have allowed an authenticated user with deve…
